# Valid ignore directive suppresses finding on the next/same line.

const exampleSecret = "sk_live_AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz"; // securemcp-ignore

# Preceding-line directive also works
// securemcp-ignore
const anotherSample = "ghp_AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123456789";

# Alias: nosecrets
const demo = "sk_live_AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz"; # nosecrets
